reverse_import_rewrites: Restore apply-phase imports from tools.validators.validation back to validation only if the whole apply is rolled back.
Restore apply-phase imports from tools.validators.identity back to meta.identity only if the whole apply is rolled back.
Restore apply-phase imports from tools.validators.stability back to meta.stability only if the whole apply is rolled back.
remove_shims: Remove shim-only old-path files after restoring original implementations.
Remove tools/validators/validation, tools/validators/identity, and tools/validators/stability directories if empty and created by apply.
Remove tools/validators/__init__.py only if apply created it and no other new package depends on it.
